Those appearing on the hands, fingers and stomach cause
attainment of wealth, good fortune and splendour, and grief res-
pectively ; on the navel, excellent food and drink s those beneath
the navel, loss of wealth by theft ; on the pelvis, wealth and corn ;
on the penis, getting a young wife and good sons ; on the anus,
wealth ; and on the testicles, fortune and an attractive personality,
[Cf. Tmx—

Pimples on the thighs augur the acquisition of vehicles and a
wife ; on the knees, loss (or trouble) on account of enemies; on the
shanks, hurt from weapons ; and on the ankles, suffering through
wandering and imprisonment.
[Cf. imR—

which is in neuter, in another gender.
